source_name: Ashdod Port Financial and Operating Updates
extraction_targets: latest visible publication date from the official hub or linked mirror
fallback mirror evidence link when the official hub blocks direct parsing

normalization_expectations.observation_summary: Ashdod Port serves as a primary maritime proxy for Israel's supply chain resilience; current collection prioritizes defensible publication metadata and provenance over unsupported throughput extraction.

quality_checks: Keep the official Ashdod hub as the canonical metadata source when direct fetches are blocked.
Record AnyFlip or linked mirror provenance only as fallback evidence, not as the canonical source of truth.
Verify the latest covered reporting period matches the latest visible publication title or metadata.
